author: Siliconera
text:
Deltarune Chapter 5 Soundtrack Released
The Deltarune Chapter 5 Original Game Soundtrack is out now, and some song titles may include spoilers.

author: Siliconera
text:
Two Kinds of Palworld Pal Keychains Launch in Japan
Two series of Palworld keychains of different kinds of Pals are now being sold in Japan.

author: Siliconera
text:
Honkai: Nexus Anima Vulberry Anima and Factions Revealed
The latest Honkai: Nexus Anima updates show off the Vulberry Anima, go over Inkifoal's evolutions, and discuss three factions.

author: Siliconera
text:
Demon Slayer Xross Link Tanjiro and Nezuko Figures Return
The Demon Slayer Xross Link Tanjiro and Nezuko figures that can be displayed alone or as a pair are back after two years.

author: Siliconera
text:
The One Piece Remake Anime Trailer Debuts
A new The One Piece trailer shows how the Wit Studio remake anime will look when it shows up on Netflix next year.

author: Siliconera
text:
Hatsune Miku and Pompompurin Licca Dolls Head to US
Hatsune Miku and Pompompurin versions of the Licca-chan doll will be at Takara Tomy's Licca Anime Expo 2026 booth.

author: Siliconera
text:
Switch 2 Azure Striker Gunvolt Trilogy Enhanced Arrives in October
The Switch 2 version of Azure Striker Gunvolt Trilogy Enhanced will show up in October and an Upgrade Pack will be sold.

author: Siliconera
text:
$80 GTA VI Physical Copies Include Download Code in a Box
The GTA VI physical copies will be out a week early for pre-loading and include a code in a box, and the Ultimate Edition has DLC.

author: Siliconera
text:
Animal Crossing Baskin-Robbins Collab Appears in July 2026
Ice cream outlets across Japan will offer Animal Crossing-themed flavors and packages throughout the whole month.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: Multiplayer Is a Highlight in Star Fox Switch 2 Remake
The Switch 2 version of Star Fox feels designed to both be comfortable and offer a means to get people playing together.

author: Siliconera
text:
Vampire Crawlers 2026 Roadmap Teases New Characters, Cards, and Stages
The first Vampire Crawlers roadmap for 2026 update releases is here and teases three new additions.

author: Siliconera
text:
Sonic Frontiers Definitive Edition Heading to Switch 2
Ratings suggested Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition could be coming to Switch 2, and we saw it today.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Japanese Disney Mobile Game Is Sparklink Stars
Disney and Coly are working on a Japanese mobile game about "Spark Riders" called Disney Sparklink Stars.

author: Siliconera
text:
Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Shows West City Characters Like Bulma
The new Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 trailer shows story scenes, the West City location, characters like Bulma, and combat.

author: Siliconera
text:
Hololive Fuwawa and Mococo Fuwamoco Nendoroids Only Sold Separately
The pre-orders for the Hololive Fuwawa and Mococo Nendoroids is live and you can only buy Fuwamoco separately and not together.
